info.name: SFA Department Master API
info.description:
CRUD API for Department Master.

Table: tbl_department_mst

Code auto-generated with prefix DP (DP0001, DP0002...)

Travel desk location & Material desk location are fixed values from backend:
  - HYDERABAD
  - MUMBAI
(Call GET /locations to get the current list)

Travel desk Incharge & Material desk Incharge are optional (future use).
SFA Role is a checkbox: 0 = No, 1 = Yes.

Search supports * wildcard on name.

request.description:
Returns the fixed list of valid travel/material desk locations.
Use these values in the location fields when creating/updating a department.
This list is managed from the backend — scalable without DB changes.

Minimal create — only required fields.
Code auto-generates as DP0001, DP0002...

Required:
  c_name

Optional:
  c_short_name
  c_travel_desk_location  — must be HYDERABAD or MUMBAI
  c_travel_desk_incharge  — employee code from FS master
  c_material_desk_location
  c_material_desk_incharge
  n_sfa_role              — 0 (No) or 1 (Yes), default 0

response.name: Success - 201
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Department created successfully.",
  "data": {
    "c_code": "DP0001",
    "c_name": "Sales",
    "c_short_name": "SLS",
    "c_travel_desk_location": null,
    "c_travel_desk_incharge": null,
    "c_material_desk_location": null,
    "c_material_desk_incharge": null,
    "n_sfa_role": 1,
    "sfa_role_label": "Yes"
  }
}

request.description:
Full create with all fields.
Location values must be exactly: HYDERABAD or MUMBAI (case-insensitive).
Incharge fields accept employee codes from Tbl_FS_Mst.

response.name: Error - Invalid Location

request.description:
Returns all active departments.
name=* returns everything.

response.name: Success - 200
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "count": 2,
  "data": [
    {
      "C_Code": "DP0001",
      "c_name": "Sales",
      "c_short_name": "SLS",
      "C_travel_desk_location": null,
      "C_travel_desk_incharge": null,
      "C_material_desk_location": null,
      "C_material_desk_incharge": null,
      "N_SFA_ROLE": 1,
      "sfa_role_label": "Yes"
    },
    {
      "C_Code": "DP0002",
      "c_name": "Marketing",
      "c_short_name": "MKT",
      "C_travel_desk_location": "HYDERABAD",
      "C_travel_desk_incharge": null,
      "C_material_desk_location": "MUMBAI",
      "C_material_desk_incharge": null,
      "N_SFA_ROLE": 0,
      "sfa_role_label": "No"
    }
  ]
}

request.description:
Wildcard search:
  S*       → starts with S
  *Sales*  → contains Sales
  *Sales   → ends with Sales
  Sales    → exact match

Fetch a single department by its code.
{{deptCode}} is auto-set when you run Create Department.

response.name: Success - 200
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "C_Code": "DP0001",
    "c_name": "Sales",
    "c_short_name": "SLS",
    "C_travel_desk_location": null,
    "C_travel_desk_incharge": null,
    "C_material_desk_location": null,
    "C_material_desk_incharge": null,
    "N_SFA_ROLE": 1,
    "sfa_role_label": "Yes",
    "D_created": "2026-05-25T05:00:00.000Z",
    "D_modified": null,
    "C_modifier": "admin1"
  }
}

request.description:
Update all fields of a department.
Code cannot be changed.
Same validations as Create apply.

response.name: Success - 200
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Department updated successfully.",
  "data": {
    "c_code": "DP0001",
    "c_name": "Sales & Marketing",
    "c_short_name": "S&M",
    "c_travel_desk_location": "MUMBAI",
    "c_travel_desk_incharge": null,
    "c_material_desk_location": "HYDERABAD",
    "c_material_desk_incharge": null,
    "n_sfa_role": 1,
    "sfa_role_label": "Yes"
  }
}

request.description:
Soft deletes a department (sets N_deleted = 1).
Record is NOT physically removed.
